mapper.sql: t.id, t.name, t.color, t.sort_order, t.is_hot, t.usage_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drama_tags dt WHERE dt.tag_id = t.id) AS drama_count, t.created_at, t.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tags t WHERE t.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM tags t ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tags) AS total_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tag_id) FROM drama_tags) AS tags_linked_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drama_tags) AS total_links, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT drama_id) FROM drama_tags) AS dramas_with_tags_count
SELECT t.name FROM tags t INNER JOIN drama_tags dt ON dt.tag_id = t.id WHERE dt.drama_id = #{dramaId} ORDER BY t.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tags (name, color, sort_order, is_hot, usage_count) VALUES ( #{name}, IFNULL(#{color}, '#409EFF'), IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0), IFNULL(#{isHot}, 0), IFNULL(#{usageCount}, 0) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tags SET name = #{name}, color = IFNULL(#{color}, '#409EFF'), sort_order = IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0), is_hot = IFNULL(#{isHot}, 0), usage_count = IFNULL(#{usageCount}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
